title: Status Frame
description: A greenhouse status-change frame: the platform's view of a greenhouse's controller connectivity changed, and/or (simulation-only) its simulated-clock speed changed. The SPA patches greenhouseSummary.status — and, when present, greenhouseSummary.time_scale — in the fleet cache in place, rather than refetching (frontend data model §5, §6). Greenhouse-scoped — the envelope zone_id is null.

zone_id.description: Always null: a status change is greenhouse-scoped.
